DEFENDANT ANDERSON IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID TORKEBEN AND LUIS SANCHEZ SIERRA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (506/JPT)

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAVALIAN, JOSHUA
